title: Large sync catch-ups no longer drop changes
summary: Syncing a workspace with a big backlog could silently lose changes: the hub sent them 1000 at a time but told the client it was fully caught up, so everything past the first batch was skipped and never re-requested. Clients now walk every batch to the end.
highlights: No more silently missing changes after a long time offline or on a fresh device
Catch-up continues in the same session instead of waiting for the next reconnect
